<!-- Generated by dart run tool/visibility/generate_visibility.dart. Edit tool/visibility/visibility_manifest.json instead. -->
# pqforge

> Post-quantum file, folder, text, media, webhook, token, document, and server recipes for Dart.
> Version 0.1.0; MIT licensed.

pqforge turns pqcrypto ML-KEM and ML-DSA primitives into application-ready envelopes, signatures, hybrid key agreement, wrapped key custody, and a local/server CLI.

## Start Here

- Website: https://turkananation.github.io/pqforge/
- Repository: https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge
- Package: https://pub.dev/packages/pqforge
- API docs: https://pub.dev/documentation/pqforge/latest/
- Wiki: https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/wiki

## Key Boundary

- pqforge composes pqcrypto ML-KEM/ML-DSA with AEAD, KDF, custody, recipes, and CLI workflows.
- It is not a validated cryptographic module.
- It does not provide:
  - CMVP/FIPS 140 module validation
  - A hard constant-time guarantee for Dart runtimes
  - A hard memory-erasure guarantee
  - Public-key trust, identity vetting, or legal e-signature policy
  - Replay stores, authorization policy, TLS, or secure infrastructure operations
  - RC4 or unauthenticated encryption

## Never Say

- FIPS validated
- FIPS 140 validated
- CMVP validated
- certified
- hard constant-time Dart guarantee
- hard memory-erasure guarantee
- ML-KEM alone is secure transport
- AES signs documents
- RC4 is supported

## Recipes

- Local File Vault: encryptFileBytes, decryptFileBytes, PqEnvelope (developer machines, backup jobs, admin laptops, server batch jobs).
- Folder Archive: encryptFolderEntry, decryptFolderEntry (case files, release bundles, evidence folders, internal archives).
- Text Snippets: sealText, openText, signText, verifyText (notes, secrets, prompts, policy snippets, short messages).
- Media Assets: sealMedia, openMedia, signMedia, verifyMedia (photos, audio, video, PDFs, campaign media, identity images).
- Document Signing: signDocument, verifyDocument (contracts, reports, certificates, approvals, policy documents).
- Webhook Integrity: signWebhook, verifyWebhook (payment callbacks, audit delivery, server-to-server events).
- Signed Tokens: issueToken, verifyToken (API capabilities, admin actions, short-lived grants).
- Private Email Payloads: sealEmail, openEmail (encrypted mail bodies, secure notifications, outbound archive mail).
- Government And Medical Records: encryptRecord, appendSignedLogEntry (public-sector records, patient records, registry payloads).
- Software Artifacts: signArtifact, verifyArtifact (release bundles, firmware, packages, configuration rollouts).
- Hybrid Server Sessions: PqForgeHybridKeyAgreement, PqForgeSecureSession (Serverpod, API services, local agents, backend handshakes).

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/blob/feat/hybrid-combiner-secure-session/README.md): High-signal overview, badges, quickstarts, recipe map, and validation commands.
- [CLI Guide](https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/blob/feat/hybrid-combiner-secure-session/doc/CLI.md): Full command-line usage for wrapped keys, file, folder, text, media, and signatures.
- [Project Catalog](https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/blob/feat/hybrid-combiner-secure-session/doc/cookbook/PROJECT_CATALOG.md): Applications and domains that map to pqforge recipes.
- [Recipe Cookbook](https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/blob/feat/hybrid-combiner-secure-session/doc/cookbook/README.md): Named recipe docs for safe application composition.
- [API Reference](https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/blob/feat/hybrid-combiner-secure-session/doc/API.md): Facade methods, hybrid tier, secure sessions, types, and CLI summary.
- [Hybrid Audit](https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/blob/feat/hybrid-combiner-secure-session/doc/HYBRID_AUDIT.md): Coverage audit against pqcrypto building blocks and explicit rejections.
- [Key Custody](https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/blob/feat/hybrid-combiner-secure-session/doc/architecture/KEY_CUSTODY.md): Wrapped key storage and pluggable custody model.
- [Claim Boundary](https://github.com/turkananation/pqforge/blob/feat/hybrid-combiner-secure-session/doc/security/CLAIM_BOUNDARY.md): Allowed and forbidden claims for package consumers and agents.
